name: ARIA (UK) — Full Programmes
F11: Programme-specific online form (concept paper → full proposal)
submission_notes: ARIA programmes are mostly proactive — teams matched to a Programme Director and programme-specific call. Two-stage: concept → invited full proposal. Default to ARIA's ambitious + uneven framing.

name: ARPA-H Health Science Futures (HSF) ISO
F11: Solution Summary → written-feedback gate → Full Proposal
submission_notes: Solution Summary first; ARPA-H provides written feedback before any full proposal is accepted. Phased budget. NSPM-33 disclosures required. SAM.gov registration.

name: NSF Tech Labs
F29: Intellectual merit;Broader impacts;Phased technical plan;Translation pathway
submission_notes: NSF Tech Labs structured as OT with phase-envelope budgets ($10–50M/yr × ≥4y). Broader Impacts is a separate review criterion. Translation pathway load-bearing.

name: NIH Bridge2AI Initiative (Stage II)
submission_notes: Bridge2AI Stage II builds on Stage I data-generation projects. Heavy emphasis on AI-readiness and ELSI plan. UG3→UH3 phase transition criteria required.

name: NSF-NIH Smart Health Program
submission_notes: Joint NSF + NIH Smart Health solicitation. Mandatory publication acknowledgment template. NSF Broader Impacts review criterion.

name: NSF Convergence Accelerator
submission_notes: Phase 1 (planning) → Phase 2 (build). Customer discovery / human-centered design plan is a hard requirement.

name: Convergent Research — FRO
submission_notes: FROs ~$50M 5y open-output capital-intensive coordination problems. Funder reaches out proactively after idea submission. Confidentiality marker for unfiled IP.

name: NIH PRIMED-AI Program
submission_notes: PRIMED-AI emphasizes multimodal data integration AI-readiness federated learning ELSI plan. EHR vendor partnership narrative load-bearing.

name: Wellcome Leap Programs
submission_notes: Wellcome Leap runs DARPA-style thrust programs. Abstract → invited 25-page full proposal. Quantitative magnitude framing. MARFA/CORFA contract instruments.

name: Schmidt Sciences Programs
submission_notes: Multi-program funder; per-program eligibility varies. Postdoc IDP and mentor/sponsor letter required for fellowship-track programs.

name: ARIA (UK) — Opportunity Seeds
submission_notes: ARIA Opportunity Seeds are smaller (~£250k) single-stage grants. Lighter than full programmes. UK-resident PI / consortium preference.

name: ARPA-H Proactive Health Office (PHO) ISO
F11: Solution Summary → written-feedback gate → Full Proposal
submission_notes: Same ISO mechanics as HSF. PHO-specific: population-level intervention design and proactive-health framing.

name: Horizon Europe — Cluster 1 Health
submission_notes: Consortium ≥3 entities from ≥3 different EU/Associated countries. Three-pillar evaluation. CDE Plan Gender-in-research-content Ethics self-assessment 25% flat-rate indirect.

name: Google.org AI for Science Impact Challenge
submission_notes: Google.org Impact Challenge — competitive single-stage ~$1.5M typical. Heavy focus on AI use mission alignment demonstrated impact.

name: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI)
submission_notes: CZI Science RFAs vary by program. 15% indirect cap. Open Science load-bearing — preprints FAIR data. No funds to mainland China.

name: Wellcome Trust Discovery Programs
F26: UK / Ireland / LMIC (excl. mainland China & India)
submission_notes: 5-8y £1-3M UK-fEC or LMIC-equivalent. PI ≥20% time + permanent contract. Cannot fund mainland China; LMIC eligibility list applies.

name: Draper Richards Kaplan Foundation
F29: Problem urgency;Systems thinking;Scalability (10k lives in 5y);Team;Theory of change
submission_notes: DRK chooses instrument (grant vs. equity) at closing. 3-year structured engagement; board placement. Theory of change required. Scalability bar: ≥10k lives in 5y.

name: Genesis Mission
F11: Concept paper → full proposal via DOE portal
submission_notes: Phase I/II OT structure. 1 lead per institution (limited submission). NSPM-33 research-security disclosures. Phased-budget structure.

name: Coefficient Giving — Global Health R&D
submission_notes: Coefficient Giving (formerly Open Philanthropy) primarily proactive. Email-first; counterfactual + cost-effectiveness (DALYs/$) load-bearing. Existing-proposal acceptable.

name: EA Funds - Long-term Future Fund
submission_notes: LTFF light-touch ~10k-char application; rolling. Counterfactual + theory-of-impact load-bearing. Individual or org grantee. ~4-month review cycles.

name: Emergent Ventures
submission_notes: Tyler Cowen's discretionary micro-grant program. Light-touch (1-2 page proposal). Min applicant age 13+. Strong on talent/counterfactual; minimal admin.

name: Robert Wood Johnson Foundation (RWJF)
submission_notes: RWJF runs many sub-programs all requiring 501(c)(3) determination letter. Theory of change + community-co-design load-bearing. ~25% indirect.

name: EA Funds - Infrastructure
submission_notes: Same form/cycle as LTFF but funds EA-ecosystem infrastructure (talent dev profession networks).

name: AWS Imagine Grant — Pathfinder GenAI
F29: Mission alignment;Frontier AI use case;Data readiness;Implementation
submission_notes: US 501(c) only; UK/Ireland regional variants exist. Pathfinder requires GenAI/agentic AI as core workload + AWS technical reference architecture. Round 2 by invitation.

name: Gates Foundation Grand Challenges - Cost-Disruptive Tools for Diagnosis and Screening
submission_notes: Cost-disruptive framing; 10% indirect cap; Global Access Policy commitment; LMIC implementation pathway load-bearing.

name: Astera Institute Residency
submission_notes: In-person Emeryville residency. 2-min demo video gate. Out-of-scope/anti-goals (U09.4) explicitly required (Astera Q7).

name: Fast Forward Accelerator
submission_notes: Funds early-stage tech nonprofits with MVP. Founder lived-experience/proximity to problem load-bearing. MVP demo gate. In-person events required.

name: AstraZeneca CHANGE Program
F11: Initial application → invited full via CyberGrants
submission_notes: US-only 501(c)(3) (no 509(a)(3)) revenue ≤$12M served populations in CA/DE/MD/MA/TX. Theory of change required. Two-stage with CyberGrants for full proposal.

name: UNESCO/WHO Open Science Projects
submission_notes: UNESCO Participation Programme grants follow biennial cycles. WHO program details unconfirmed. Open Science Recommendation alignment load-bearing.

name: QB3 / Bakar Labs (UC Berkeley)
submission_notes: Bakar Bio Labs in-kind only (lab space + equipment subsidized rent). Wet-lab needs assessment required. Cytognosis fit low — software/AI-first.

name: Adobe for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Adobe nonprofit discount via TechSoup. Verification-only. Inventory marks Rejected.

name: AWS Activate
submission_notes: Activate has Founders Package ($1k) and Portfolio Package ($100k) gated by Activate Provider Org ID. 501(c)(3) may not qualify; AWS Imagine or Nonprofit Credit Program preferred.

name: IndieBio (SOSV)
submission_notes: Equity (~$525k for ~8%) for 4-month cohort in SF or NY. 501(c)(3) is poor fit (for-profit-oriented).

name: Y Combinator
submission_notes: Cytognosis path is YC nonprofit cohort (covered by yc_s26_pbc canonical funder). 1-min video required. Inventory Rejected — strategic decision not to apply.

name: Anthropic AI for Science Program
submission_notes: $20k API credits 6-month redemption. Academic/nonprofit only. Strong direct fit for Cytognosis.

name: Berkeley SkyDeck
submission_notes: UC Berkeley accelerator. Mostly Berkeley-affiliated startups. Cytognosis fit low (501c3).

name: Google Health AI Developer Foundations (HAI-DEF)
submission_notes: HAI-DEF gives developer access to Google's health AI foundation models. Verification-only.

name: Foresight Institute — AI for Science & Safety Nodes
F29: AI safety relevance;Open science;Team;Theory of change
submission_notes: 6-12 month residencies in SF or Berlin. Strong on AI safety + open science. Cytognosis previously rejected per inventory.

name: Atlassian for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Atlassian community license for verified nonprofits. Verification-only.

name: MATLAB Startup Program
submission_notes: MathWorks discounted MATLAB license for early-stage startups.

name: Microsoft Azure + NVIDIA Healthcare
submission_notes: Joint Microsoft + NVIDIA healthcare cloud-credit program. Up to ~$200k Azure credits + NVIDIA tooling.

name: Brains Accelerator (Spec.tech)
submission_notes: Brains Accelerator focuses on bold tech thesis + opportunity-space framing. Cytognosis previously rejected.

name: NVIDIA Inception Program
submission_notes: NVIDIA Inception is for AI startups; eligibility historically excluded most nonprofits — reflected in inventory Rejected status.

name: Johnson & Johnson JLABS
F29: Healthcare innovation;Strategic alignment with J&J;Stage;Wet-lab needs
submission_notes: JLABS is no-strings (no equity) but co-located with J&J. Strategic-alignment narrative load-bearing. Wet-lab needs assessment required.

name: AWS Nonprofit Credit Program
submission_notes: $2k AWS credits for verified 501(c)(3). Verification-only.

name: Google Cloud AI Startup Program
F11: Google for Startups Cloud Program application
submission_notes: Up to $350k Google Cloud credits for AI startups (tiered). Self-serve eligibility via VC/accelerator partner.

name: Canva for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Canva Pro free for verified nonprofits (up to ~50 users). Already approved.

name: Cisco / Meraki for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Cisco/Meraki discount via TechSoup. Verification-only.

name: Dell Technologies for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Dell hardware discount via TechSoup. Already approved.

name: Claude for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Claude for Nonprofits — discounted Pro/Team. Already approved.

name: Google Workspace for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Google Workspace for Nonprofits — free tier. Already approved (primary render target).

name: DocuSign for Nonprofits
submission_notes: DocuSign nonprofit plan. Verification-only.

name: HP Inc. for Nonprofits
submission_notes: HP hardware discount via TechSoup. Already approved.

name: LinkedIn for Nonprofits
submission_notes: LinkedIn for Nonprofits (recruiter / learning discounts). Already approved.

name: GitHub for Nonprofits
submission_notes: GitHub Team free for verified nonprofits. Already approved (primary code-hosting platform).

name: Zoom for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Zoom for Nonprofits — discounted Pro/Business. Already approved.

name: Monday.com for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Monday.com for Nonprofits — discounted plan. Already approved (primary workspace platform).

name: Slack for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Slack for Nonprofits — Standard plan free or 85% off. Already approved.

name: Lenovo for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Lenovo hardware discount via TechSoup. Already approved.

name: Otter.ai for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Otter.ai discount via TechSoup. Verification-only.

name: Microsoft for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Microsoft for Nonprofits — Cloud + M365 discounts.

name: OpenAI for Nonprofits
submission_notes: OpenAI ChatGPT Team discount for nonprofits. Already approved.

name: Notion for Nonprofits
submission_notes: Notion Plus plan free for verified nonprofits.

name: Fifty Years VC - 5050 Fellowship
submission_notes: Phase I (Explore) → Phase II (Build) with potential investment. PhD/early-company stage. Cytognosis fit low (already established 501c3).

name: Mixpanel for Startups
submission_notes: Mixpanel Startups (analytics credits up to ~$150k value). Verification-only.

name: Anthropic Anthology Fund
submission_notes: Demo video required. Pre-Seed/Seed/Series A. Cytognosis fit low (501c3).

name: Breakthrough Energy Ventures
F29: ≥0.5 Gt/yr GHG reduction;Scientific feasibility;Affordability at scale
submission_notes: ≥0.5 Gt/yr GHG-reduction threshold. 20-year ROI horizon. Cytognosis fit very low (health not climate).

name: Lux Capital
submission_notes: Deep-tech / contrarian thesis VC. Cytognosis fit low (501c3).

name: Deep Science Ventures
submission_notes: Venture builder model. Sectors: climate computation agriculture pharma. Cytognosis fit low (501c3).

name: The Next Sequence VC
submission_notes: Profile partial — limited public detail. Treat as standard early-stage AI/biotech VC. Cytognosis fit low.

name: Foresite Labs
submission_notes: Health-data venture studio (Foresite Capital affiliate). Cytognosis fit low (501c3).
